Localization.Description: Password bruteforcing for MongoDB server accounts

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Local password bruteforcing attempts for MongoDB server account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.ip}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
Successful password bruteforcing from host {src.ip} for MongoDB server account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.ip}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Successful password bruteforcing locally for MongoDB server account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.ip}. Number of failed login attempts: {datafield1}.
Password bruteforcing attempts from host {src.ip} for MongoDB server account {subject.account.name} on host {event_src.ip}. Number of login attempts: {datafield1}.
